system.summary: Radiates heat; 1d6 damage per round within 3m to unprotected creatures.

effect.notes: Emit a beam of heat once every 3 rounds.

description.value:
The plant develops special heat organs, usually on top of the plant or at the ends of motile limbs, that fire beams doing 4d6 searing damage. Each beam has a maximum range of 15 meters and may be used once every 3 melee turns. No plant can have more than 3 such organs.

Unintelligent plants, and plants that lack improved sensory organs, attack anything that comes within range and have a 25% chance to miss each shot outright; if that miss occurs, no attack roll is made. Intelligent plants and plants with superior senses do not suffer that penalty and are not forced to fire immediately.
